notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas flies out to right fielder Esteury Ruiz.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: James Wood singles on a ground ball to shortstop Otto Lopez. James Wood to 2nd. James Wood advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Otto Lopez.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Leo Jiménez scores.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández pops out to first baseman Luis García Jr. in foul territory.
